name: chr22_22q13_33_RABL2B_subtelomeric_SD
description: 22q13.33 subtelomeric region with RABL2B/MAPK8IP2/ARSA/SHANK3-distal SDs. RABL2B is paralog of RABL2A on 2q14; their ~5 kb subtelomeric duplicon is shared with many other subtelomeres (chr1q, 9p, 10q, 22q). Cross-reference with the Phelan-McDermid 22q13 file for SHANK3 BPs.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD blocks shared with multiple chromosome ends; near-telomere TTAGGG arrays.
